title: Upon Cob. Epig.
content:
Cob clouts his shoes, and, as the story tells,
    His thumb nails par'd afford him sparrables.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Cob. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
